news.title:
ONGC reported a fire at its SHP Platform, injuring 10 personnel.
The blaze was swiftly controlled, and operations have been restored.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Premier Energies, ONGC, Oil India, Newgen Software, and Cello World for growth sectors.

news.title:
Oracle Financial Services and HAL are recommended as holds and buys, respectively, with positive long-term outlooks.
ONGC receives a sell call due to market risks, while Gail is attractive at current levels with a target of Rs 160-165.

news.title:
Chandan Taparia recommends buying National Aluminium Co. (Target: ₹410, SL: ₹375) and ONGC (Target: ₹302, SL: ₹275).
Taparia suggests selling United Spirits futures (Target: ₹1,150, SL: ₹1,260) due to bearish patterns.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Nalco, ONGC, Coal India, MRPL, and GAIL for buy, citing technical and sectoral trends.
Nalco targets Rs 410-440, ONGC Rs 302, Coal India Rs 475, MRPL Rs 202, and GAIL Rs 146 with respective stop losses.

news.title:
Kotak Securities recommends ONGC with FV ₹375; optimistic outlook due to high oil prices, NWG growth & gas production ramp-up.
Emmvee Photovoltaic rated ADD with FV ₹250; strong growth in solar cell/module capacity and expanded order book supports outlook.
news.summary:
Kotak Securities recommends ONGC with FV ₹375; optimistic outlook due to high oil prices, NWG growth & gas production ramp-up.

news.title:
